intent: Exhaustively map each unique assets-src content hash to its source records, filesystem target placements, zip evidence, archive-plan coverage, and review queue coverage.
source_rule: data/assets-src/sprites remains source authority. This manifest is evidence only and cannot approve moves, deletion, runtime sync, or deploys.
required_next_gate: Use sha256 lookups to answer where a source asset leaves assets-src.
Do not move or delete source files from this manifest.
For source-only content, work the source-only review queue before archive assumptions.
For archive-plan-covered content, use exact plan approval and rerun the mapper immediately before receipt writing.
